name: JSON Assoc
description: Returns a new map with 'value' set at 'path' inside 'target'. Path may be a single string key or a vector of keys for nested paths. Intermediate maps are created if missing. Equivalent to Clojure assoc-in or Lodash _.set.

target.description: Map to update. Defaults to empty map if not provided.

path.description: String (single key) or vector of keys (nested path).

value.description: Value to set at the path.
